description: Payer conversion funnel and opt-in / failure product metrics, sourced from pwa.* customEvents in Application Insights (appi-ic-hack). Naming follows the PWA telemetry allowlist (snake_case customEvents).
title: IC — Payer funnel & product metrics

panels.title: Payer conversion funnel (unique flows per stage)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let ev = customEvents
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name in ("pwa.session_started", "pwa.bill_lookup", "pwa.payment_method_selected", "pwa.review_opened", "pwa.payment_submitted", "pwa.payment_completed")
| extend flow_id = tostring(customDimensions.flow_id), outcome = tostring(customDimensions.outcome);
ev
| where name != "pwa.bill_lookup" or outcome == "found"
| summarize flows = dcount(flow_id) by name
| extend stage_order = case(name == "pwa.session_started", 1, name == "pwa.bill_lookup", 2, name == "pwa.payment_method_selected", 3, name == "pwa.review_opened", 4, name == "pwa.payment_submitted", 5, name == "pwa.payment_completed", 6, 99)
| extend stage = case(name == "pwa.session_started", "1 session_started", name == "pwa.bill_lookup", "2 bill_lookup (found)", name == "pwa.payment_method_selected", "3 payment_method_selected", name == "pwa.review_opened", "4 review_opened", name == "pwa.payment_submitted", "5 payment_submitted", name == "pwa.payment_completed", "6 payment_completed", name)
| order by stage_order asc
| project stage, flows

customEvents
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name in ("pwa.payment_failed", "pwa.bill_lookup")
| extend error_category = tostring(customDimensions.error_category)
| where isnotempty(error_category)
| summarize failures = count() by error_category, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
